headline: Hormel Foods’s Q1 Earnings Call: Our Top 5 Analyst Questions
summary: Hormel’s first quarter results were positively received by the market, driven by solid revenue growth and a notable outperformance on non-GAAP earnings per share. Management credited the quarter’s performance to disciplined pricing actions, improved manufacturing efficiency, and momentum across both foodservice and international segments. CEO Jeffrey Ettinger emphasized the company’s “sixth consecutive quarter of organic net sales growth” and cited the protein-focused portfolio as a source of re
